title: Graduate `agent-setup` skill to typed WorkflowModel + OperatingProtocolModel
description: Application bead 5/5 for agent-blame-shielded-workflow-doctrine. agent-setup creates new agents — its operations have cascading consequences (identity authoring, kura tree materialization, persona binding). Read ~/.claude/skills/agent-setup/SKILL.md (or substrate-side equivalent if skill is gone); author agent-setup-workflow.json with typed WorkflowGraphNodes for each step. Author SOP. Tier 3 tests including invariants like 'agent-setup never proceeds if identity slug collides with existing commissioned home.' End-to-end validation. After wd-graduation pilot.
